_comment_about: Copy this file to .podcli/thumbnail-config.json (or run `podcli init-thumbnail`). Every field is overridable; missing fields fall back to placeholder defaults. _comment_* keys are ignored by the loader -leave them in or strip them.
_comment_opt_in: Set enabled to false to skip thumbnail generation even when this file exists.
_comment_canvas: 1080x1920 is YouTube Shorts / TikTok / Reels. Don't change unless you know why.
_comment_palette: Three colors do most of the work. bg_color shows through the photo gradient at the bottom. text_color is line 1. accent_color is the highlight pill behind line 2 (or the frame border).
_comment_frame: Thin border around the whole 9:16 canvas. Set width to 0 to disable.
_comment_text_box: The white-ish card that sits over the bottom of the photo. box_y / box_y_with_photo are CSS top values - fraction or px.
_comment_line1: Top headline. Typically white. Keep short - line1_nowrap will scale text down to fit.
_comment_line2: Second line - usually the punchline / hook. line2_text_color sits on top of the accent-colored highlight pill.
_comment_photo: Guest photo brightness multiplier (1.0 = unchanged). Drop it to 0.7 for moody, raise toward 1.0 for crisp.
_comment_gradient: Vertical gradient over the photo. Top gradient softens any logo area; bottom gradient fades into bg_color behind the text box.
_comment_logo: Position one of: top-left, top-right, top-center, bottom-center, none. Logo image lives under .podcli/assets/ (register via manage_assets).
_comment_font: Use any Google Font or system font. font_import_url is fetched by the rendering browser. Strip both fields to use whatever's local.
_comment_variations: Number of variations rendered per clip. variation_offset_up/down vertically shifts the text block in alternate variants.
_comment_pre_clip_thumbnail: How long the still thumbnail plays at the start of the rendered short before the live video begins. 0.5–1.0s is the sweet spot.
